description:
GIVEN a user has launched the app
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the [calendar] button
steps.result:
THEN the calendar for the current month is displayed
AND the games page date is highlighted white
AND each date displays its total number of games for that date in black text
AND the days of the week are 3-letter abbreviations
AND the month with year is left justified at the top of the page
AND the correct number of days is displayed for the given month
AND the previous month [<-] button displays to the right of the month/year
AND the next month [->] button displays to the right of the [<-] button
AND the [Today] button displays to the right of the [->] button
AND the background is black
AND the week starts with Sunday
AND the day numbers are in the upper left corner of the day tiles in gray text
